title: Trained to See - Three Women and the War
original_title: Trained to See – Three Women and the War
overview: During the Second World War, women were for the first time allowed to work as war correspondents. Based on reports, letters and diary excerpts, filmmaker Luzia Schmid sketches a personal portrait of three fearless women and their unique attempts to report on the war.
